targets.queryText: SELECT tier, name, description, target_monthly, required_portfolio_value, final_portfolio_value, progress_pct, months_to_goal, estimated_goal_date, confidence, assumption_monthly_contribution, assumption_drip_enabled, assumption_annual_appreciation_pct, assumption_ltv_maintained, assumption_target_ltv_pct FROM daily_goal_tiers WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_goal_tiers) ORDER BY tier
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tier, name, description, target_monthly, required_portfolio_value, final_portfolio_value, progress_pct, months_to_goal, estimated_goal_date, confidence, assumption_monthly_contribution, assumption_drip_enabled, assumption_annual_appreciation_pct, assumption_ltv_maintained, assumption_target_ltv_pct FROM daily_goal_tiers WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_goal_tiers) ORDER BY tier

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT goal_pace_windows_json FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1), windows AS (SELECT value AS w FROM latest, json_each(latest.goal_pace_windows_json)) SELECT json_extract(w,'$.window_name') AS window_name, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.days_in_window') AS INTEGER) AS days, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.expected.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS expected_pv, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.actual.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS actual_pv, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.delta.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS pv_delta, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.delta.portfolio_value_pct') AS REAL) AS pv_delta_pct, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.pace.months_ahead_behind') AS REAL) AS months_ahead_behind, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.pace.pct_of_tier_pace') AS REAL) AS pct_of_tier_pace FROM windows ORDER BY days
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT goal_pace_windows_json FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1), windows AS (SELECT value AS w FROM latest, json_each(latest.goal_pace_windows_json)) SELECT json_extract(w,'$.window_name') AS window_name, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.days_in_window') AS INTEGER) AS days, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.expected.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS expected_pv, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.actual.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS actual_pv, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.delta.portfolio_value') AS REAL) AS pv_delta, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.delta.portfolio_value_pct') AS REAL) AS pv_delta_pct, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.pace.months_ahead_behind') AS REAL) AS months_ahead_behind, CAST(json_extract(w,'$.pace.pct_of_tier_pace') AS REAL) AS pct_of_tier_pace FROM windows ORDER BY days
